title: Bridge Essay: Meditation reduces brain activity in the default mode network in children with active cancer and survivors.
concept: Self-dissolution, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — self-dissolution, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual awareness.
**Phase context:** Self-dissolution, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual.

**Meditation reduces brain activity in the default mode network in children with active cancer and survivors.** — Pediatr Blood Cancer (2022). DOI: 10.1002/pbc.29917. PMID: 35927934. BACKGROUND: Mounting evidence demonstrates that meditation can lower pain and emotional distress in adults, and more recently, in children. Children may benefit from meditation given its accessibility across a variety of settings (e.g., surgical preparation). Recent neuroimaging studies in adults suggest that meditation techniques are neurobiologically distinct from other forms of emotion regulation, such as distraction, that rely on prefrontal control mechanisms, which are underdeveloped in you
